sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n31035" key="ei)/kw1" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree">*<orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εἴκω</orth>, <sense id="n31035.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be like, seem likely</tr_>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἔοικα</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
